feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to add a warning message when no value is obtained in condition type for taxes in purchase order
entry.content:
Hi gurus, 

I have been requested to add a condition type for tax determination when creating POs, this condition type has a sequence of 5 condition tables and I need to show a warning message when none of the tables have given a result (no condition has matched) and therefore the tax hasn't been calculated.

I have tried to search in spro in case it can be configured somewhere but haven't found anything, am I missing something? Does anyone knows a customer exit or BAdI to add this message after the validation?

Thanks, 

 

Álvaro.

entry.title: loan replacement material in customer repair process
entry.content:
hello gurus

I am relatively new to this process so I need your help.

I checked online but could not find the steps for this scenario.

1) our customer is sending material to be repaired

2) During repair time, we send him substitute material on loan

3) when the customer material is repaired, we send him back his own material and recuperate the material we gave him on loan.

The steps are clear and the repair process works well, what I am not sure about is how to send and later recuperate the material we give to the customer on loan?

meaning, how do I send it, what movement/special stock do I use, how to return it?

entry.title: CFOP - Incompletion Log creating Customer Returns
entry.content:
Hi all.

I have a problem when creating a Customer Returns Order. The incompletion log shows the following message. Following data still needs to be completed.

Item Missing data:

10 CFOP
10 ICMS Law
10 IPI Law
10 Tax Code
11 Order Quantity
11 Gross Weight
11 CFOP
11 ICMS Law
11 IPI Law
11 Tax Code
11 Net Price
11 Net Value
11 Net Weight

How can I solve this?

Please help.

entry.title: S4HANA SERVICES SETTLEMENT TO COST CENTER
entry.content:
Dear

I am using S4hana services for service billing concept, but in the scenario that the repair cost should be assumed by a cost center, I can't find the correct configuration or process.

I look forward to your comments

entry.title: Delivery has not yet been put away
entry.content:
Delivery has not yet been put away

I am getting this error while doing the return the item at consignment premises 

after doing the KR i am not able to do PGI

entry.title: RMAN setup issue
entry.content:
Recently, we are in process to setup RMAN in our space where we were using brtools using backint before.
I want to know how to use multiple files and multiple channels for RMAN using brtools.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to check the top level work item ID in mass (without accessing the details of the workflow log)
entry.content:
With the solution of KBA 3277360 it is possible to find top level work item ID. But the solution is on single work item basis. 

How to check the top level work item ID in mass (without accessing the details of the workflow log). 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Language not support by DM while Material from ERP to DM
entry.content:
Hi Community,

While transferring Material from ERP to DM, We are getting below Error. We have maintained multiple languages description for Materials inside additional data in ERP. For those materials where we are maintaining  Z1(Customer reserve ) as language code, DM is not accepting those materials. Giving this below Error saying  "message": "Language Z is not supported".

Kind Regards,

Utkarsh Raj

@ManoelCosta

entry.title: Hugepages value for production system
entry.content:
Hi Team, We have received TPO report from SAP where we would like to get the recommended hugepages value for this section "Hugepages not used for Oracle SGA on LINUX". Can you please provide the recommended value to set for operating server and database? We have attached document from SAP analysis. Please let us know if you need anyadditional information regarding this.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: NW 7.4 dual stack upgrade
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We need to upgrade NW 7.4 Dual stack to NW 7.5
Please send us blog/steps involved in this activity


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Make an existing long text of maintenance order header non-editable
entry.content:
Dear all,

If the functionality to make the Long text of a notification non-editable exists ( see SIMG OLQN_CL & TQ80-QMLTXT02), a similar configuration seems not to be available for the header text of an order ( Maintenance ) 

Kindly suggest a suitable User exit, where a suitable logic could be implemented, to make an existing long text in Maintenance order non-editable in the same way as it's done (~ with the same result ) for QM/PM notification ( see below e.g. ) 

SAP_APPL 617 ^^ 

Tx in advance!

entry.title: What is the impact of oracle ogg impdp/expdp and SAP on-time integration on source libraries
entry.content:
Note DIGITS  


Reorganisationen auf Data Pump durfen ausschliß lich offline durchgefuhrt werden.   Das heisst, Reorganisationen Auf data pump durfen ausschliß lich offline durchgefuhrt werden.   Das Heisst, das SAP-System darf wahrend der gesamten Reorganisationsphase nicht gestartet sein.

 

I'd like to understand the effects of priming,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP on PaaS Cloud SQL di GCP
entry.content:
dear expert,

I need to know if is possible to migrate a SAP Microsoft SQL DATABASE to GCP Cloud SQL PaaS. Is it certified for SAP?
if so, is it possible to have a SAP NOTE that clarifies the steps to perform this or that certifies the feasibility of this data migration from a classic Microsoft SQL toGCP Cloud SQL PaaS?

regards, 





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Delete Vendor order confirmation
entry.content:
Hello,

we setup ORDER idocs with a vendor and we got back an ORDRSP for it.
The ORDRSP creats an line in the confirmations tab in the purchase order so everything is fine.

Is it possible to delete these line with a second ORDRSP IDOC? So if the vendor wants to withdraw the first ORDRSP and don't can sent a new date.

entry.title: Maintenance Plan calls & their status
entry.content:
Hello All 

I want to develop report which will give me maintenance plan information along with their call list and status of call list. I am not getting information from MPLA, MHIO, MHIS MMPT table regarding Maintenance call schedule type/status from the table. How to get the information? is there any standard FM available which will give the status of maintenance call by passing call number along with maintenance plan number?

Regards

Makarand

entry.title: R47 Delete ABAP Session after Error
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I want to find out an error on our developement SAP instance. In SM21, we have messages "Delete ABAP session T208_U1004_M0(Info = Error Message [Error/Core]" we tried to check the dev_wp trace and found the below error 

*** WARNING => ThResFreeSession: free resources of T208_U1004_M0 (normal mode, complete free), rc=ERROR-CORE-ERR_MSG, db_action=TH_DB_ROLLBACK [thxxmode.c 888]
***LOG R47=> ThResFreeSession, delete (ERROR-CORE-ERR_MSG) [thxxmode.c 1172]
ThResFreeSession: delete T208_U1004_M0.

For the affected work process, the following information is shown in dispatcher trace (dev_disp)

DpHdlDeadWp: W29 (pid=7084) terminated automatically
DpWpDynCreate: created new work process W29-8238

Kindly help to find the root cause.

 

Regards,

Subasri

entry.title: Migration from RHEL6.6 in on-premise to RHEL 7.x in AWS environment
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

We plan to migrate the current ERP6.0 system running in the on-premise environment to AWS environment.

The current ERP6.0 system is utilizing "OS: RHEL 6.6 ,DB :OracleDB IP_ADDRESS" .

As we cannot use RHEL6.6 in AWS environment, we must use RHEL7.x in AWS environment.

If we migrate the current ERP 6.0 system running on RHEL 6.6 and Oracle DB IP_ADDRESS in the on-premise environment to the server running RHEL 7.x and Oracle DB IP_ADDRESS in AWS environment, 

can you please tell us if there is anything we need to do on the RHEL 7.x and Oracle DB IP_ADDRESS server side?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can I export a ttf file or font file from sap?
entry.content:
I need the font HELVE so that we can convert a label printed with prescibe to pcl. I can only select this font in SAP.

 

How can I export this font to windows?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CJI4/CJI4N how to display statistical WBS elements
entry.content:
CJI4/CJI4N: does not display individual plan items on the WBS elements which are statistical.

Note: customizing has been checked according to KBA 1889941 - CJI4 doesn't show any value in certain version.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
